title: ophrys lutea subsp. murbeckii
intro: Ophrys lutea subsp. murbeckii, commonly known as the Yellow Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Ophrys lutea subsp. murbeckii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
